_comment: Add seed entries to the seeds array below.
versions may contain exact versions like 1.16.5, version lanes like 1.16.x, classic versions like b1.7.3 or a1.0.16, or * for any version.
policy may be exact or highest_patch.
exact means only the listed version or versions are valid.
highest_patch means Pinecraft will choose the highest available patch within the listed version lane.
Users may add their own seeds by adding entries to the seeds array and submitting a pull request.
